/*! * is-extglob <https://github.com/jonschlinkert/is-extglob> * * Copyright (c) 2014-2016, Jon Schlinkert. * Licensed under the MIT License. */ module.exports = function isExtglob(str) { if (typeof str !== 'string' || str === '') { return false; } var match; while ((match = /(\\).|([@?!+*]\(.*\))/g.exec(str))) { if (match[2]) return true; str = str.slice(match.index + match[0].length); } return false; };
